signal.description: Supplement for diapr.ai continuation bug: non-continuous PM seed works after cleanup; continuous/intake issue remains

evidence.value: Supplement to bug intent_1777702113605_72a4. Correction: a foreground non-continuous continuation did start successfully after removing empty .agentxchain/logs files I had created. Command: agentxchain run --continue-from run_954fc3dc8164adc2 --inherit-context --role pm --max-turns 1 --auto-approve --auto-checkpoint --verbose. It assigned active PM turn turn_48c477f22fcaec1d in planning phase and dispatched local-pm stream-json. The original continuous/intake bug remains: continuous continuation from completed run idles with current_run_id=run_0b00ed1aa694dda8 and no current objective; injected p0 PM intent_1777701984130_401f was marked superseded because planning artifacts already existed and intake start refused it. Operational workaround: remove unrelated actor-owned dirty files, then use non-continuous continuation with --role pm.
